symptom_vector: Node memory exhaustion, node memory saturation, node high memory usage, node memory leak, node memory stress

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [aiops-k8s-08] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [http.resp.status] and [302] in Log data (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [node_disk_read_bytes_total] and [node_disk_read_time_seconds_total] in Metric data (From GT key_observations)
Step 4: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [node memory stress] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: HTTP response status code 302 appearing in log entries
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'http.resp.status' and value '302' in log data during the fault time window

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Abnormal increase in node disk read bytes metric
critical_checks.instruction: Check if metric [node_disk_read_bytes_total] shows abnormal patterns on node aiops-k8s-08

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Increased node disk read time indicating memory pressure
critical_checks.instruction: Check if metric [node_disk_read_time_seconds_total] shows elevated values on node aiops-k8s-08
